# RULES.md
## Rules
### This file rules
- Use plain language
- Under 16 words per line
- Split compound phrases into separate lines for clarity
- No semicolons
- No em-dashes
- No parentheticals
- Each rule states what to do followed by why
### Read skills
- Run `npx openskills read <skill-name>` to load instructions into context
### Setup commands
- Install deps: `npm install`
- Start dev server: `npm dev`
- Run tests: `npm test`
### TypeScript code style
- TypeScript strict mode
- Single quotes, no semicolons
- Use functional patterns where possible
### Agent behavior
- Use sub-agents to do several things at once.
- Don't commit until the user has reviewed the changes
